use_cases: Interactive feature highlights on landing pages
Product or service showcase cards with dynamic hover effects
User profile cards with immersive mouse-tracking animations
Pricing tier cards with premium glass aesthetic
Interactive dashboard widgets with cursor-following effects
ai_summary: A glassmorphic card component with mouse-tracking interaction that creates a dynamic cursor-following glow effect. The component uses GPU-accelerated transforms and smooth transitions for a premium feel, with configurable circle size for the hover effect. Features translucent white background styling with scale animations on hover and optional arrow icon overlay. Ideal for SaaS landing pages, product showcases, and interactive feature sections.
